productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Pack of 2 White Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of white ankle socks from United Colors  of Benetton. Perfect for a game of tennis, this sock looks great when teamed with skirts.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneHas the brand name on the lateral midfoot and brand logo on the mouthSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
